slots_not_full: ❌ Cannot start lobby: not all slots are filled (need 10/10).
no_vc_perms: ⚠️ Bot lacks permissions to create voice channels.
vc_api_error: ❌ Discord API error while creating channels.
match_started: ✅ Match started! Passwords sent, teams balanced by MMR, channels created.
lobby_not_found: ❌ Lobby not found or already finished.
match_finished:
✅ Match finished! **{winner}** won.
Match recorded in history.
join_vc_first: ❌ Please join the voice channel {vc_mention} first!
banned: ❌ You are banned from matchmaking. Ban expires: {expire_time}.
already_in_lobby: ❌ You are already in lobby `#{short_id}`. Leave it or finish the match first.
lobby_closed: ❌ Lobby is closed or already started.
lobby_full: 🎉 Lobby 10/10 is ready! <@{host_id}>, start the match via `⚙️ Manage Lobby`.
not_active_lobby: ❌ This message is not an active lobby.
no_perms_manage: ❌ You don't have permission to manage this lobby.
manage_panel:
🔧 **Lobby Control Panel ID:** `{lobby_id}`
Select an action below:
ghost_lobby: ❌ Found obsolete lobby data ('ghost'). Database cleaned.
